patch.value: preflight: fail-fast Slack-credential gate for standup post path

Add a fail-fast preflight credential gate to the standup command so that when a Slack post is actually requested (anything other than --dry-run) but no usable webhook is configured, the command aborts immediately with a clear, actionable, non-zero error BEFORE reading pm data or rendering — without breaking the legitimate stdout-fallback/--dry-run paths. Adds the 'preflight' capability to the manifest and a scoped pass-through registerPreflight.

value.author: codex
value.text: DESIGN: 'Post requested' = NOT --dry-run. The gate (preflightSlackCredentials) runs as the FIRST statement of the standup run() handler, before fetchAllItems/render. It throws CommandError(USAGE=exit 2) only when isPostRequested(options) && no usable webhook. needsBaseWebhook() treats empty --channels or any bare #name as requiring the base webhook; a --channels list of only full webhook URLs is self-sufficient and passes. Helpers (isPostRequested/needsBaseWebhook/preflightSlackCredentials) are exported + unit-tested.

value.author: codex
value.text: SCOPING (post-vs-fallback): Must NOT block the legitimate non-posting paths. --dry-run (preview to stdout) is explicitly exempted by isPostRequested. --fallback-to-stdout is NOT exempted: it still requires a webhook to ATTEMPT the post (it only converts a transport failure into stdout+exit0), so a post with --fallback-to-stdout and no webhook is still a misconfiguration the gate correctly catches. Kept the gate scoped to the standup command only; no logic that belongs in pm-slack was duplicated.

value.author: codex
value.text: SDK FINDING (swallow-throw): pm runtime wraps registerPreflight overrides in try/catch and downgrades a thrown error to a non-fatal WARNING — a throw from registerPreflight does NOT abort the command. Therefore the authoritative fail-fast gate lives in the command HANDLER (throw there reliably yields non-zero exit). registerPreflight is registered as a scoped pass-through (returns empty delta) purely to surface the 'preflight' capability. Manifest fact #2 respected: 'schema' kept because the command declares flags:[].

value.author: codex
value.text: FUNCTIONAL EVIDENCE (real data, /tmp/scratch-standup with 4 items: 1 in_progress, 1 blocked, 1 open, 1 closed; extension installed via 'pm install ... --project', activated w/ capabilities commands+importers+preflight+schema). (1) POST-REQUESTED, WEBHOOK UNSET: 'pm standup --channel #team-eng' (PM_SLACK_WEBHOOK unset) -> immediate abort, message 'Slack post requested but no webhook is configured...', EXIT 2, nothing posted. (2) FALLBACK/PREVIEW: 'pm standup --dry-run --include-done' (no webhook) -> printed full standup, EXIT 0, NOT blocked. (3) DUMMY CREDS: PM_SLACK_WEBHOOK=https://hooks.slack.invalid/... 'pm standup --channel #team-eng' -> preflight PASSED, proceeded to transport, failed at DNS (different error), EXIT 1 — proves gate fires only on missing creds. (4) --fallback-to-stdout w/ dummy creds -> passed gate, attempted post, fell back to stdout, EXIT 0. Build+typecheck clean; 38/38 unit tests pass.

patch.value: Added preflightSlackCredentials() (plus isPostRequested/needsBaseWebhook helpers) invoked as the first statement of the standup run() handler; throws CommandError(USAGE/exit 2) only when a post is requested (not --dry-run) and no usable webhook is configured, before any data read/render. Added 'preflight' to manifest capabilities and a scoped pass-through registerPreflight (handler-level throw because the runtime swallows preflight throws). README documents the gate; 5 new unit tests added (38 total). 'schema' kept (command declares flags).
A post requested with no webhook aborts immediately with a clear, actionable, non-zero error and posts nothing; --dry-run and webhook-present paths are unaffected.

Verified on real data: post w/o webhook -> exit 2 immediate abort, nothing posted; --dry-run -> exit 0 full standup printed (not blocked); dummy creds -> preflight passes, reaches transport (exit 1 DNS); --fallback-to-stdout w/ creds -> exit 0 stdout fallback. Build+typecheck clean; 38/38 tests pass.
Implemented and functionally verified the fail-fast Slack-credential preflight gate for the standup post path.
